rule.description: Multiple Windows Logon Failures — Possible Brute Force Attack

full_log: WinEvtLog: Security: AUDIT_FAILURE(4625): An account failed to log on. Subject: Security ID: S-1-0-0 Account Name: - Account Domain: - Logon ID: 0x0 Logon Type: 3 Account For Which Logon Failed: Security ID: S-1-0-0 Account Name: Administrator Account Domain: CORP Failure Information: Failure Reason: Unknown user name or bad password. Status: 0xC000006D Sub Status: 0xC0000064 Process Information: Caller Process ID: 0x0 Caller Process Name: - Network Information: Workstation Name: KALI-ATTACKER Source Network Address: 192.168.50.99 Source Port: 41892 Detailed Authentication Information: Logon Process: NtLmSsp Authentication Package: NTLM Transited Services: - Package Name (NTLM only): - Key Length: 0

system.message: An account failed to log on.

eventdata.failureReason: Unknown user name or bad password.
